title: Delicate Ethiopian Collard Greens Gomen
description: A traditional Ethiopian dish featuring earthy and crunchy collard greens, made with mirin and simmered to perfection, served in individual mini cocottes.
instructions: Rinse the chopped collard greens and set them aside to drain.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the berbere spice, salt, and black pepper, and cook for another minute.
Add the mirin and lemon juice, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped collard greens to the pan and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes, or until the greens are tender.
Serve the gomen in individual mini cocottes, garnished with a sprinkle of berbere spice.
